description: MCP Market is a directory for discovering MCP servers, MCP clients, and agent skills, with a related Hub product for managing and sharing agent skills and MCP toolkits. The site presents catalog and product information and links users into its hosted app.
summary: mcpmarket.com exposes a public web directory of MCP servers/skills and marketing pages for MCP Market Hub; no public developer API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP connect endpoint, or CLI was discoverable on this domain.
